user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
Priority: MEDIUM
Category: Feature Request

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I completely understand why you're checking in on this. Waiting six months for an update on a feature you requested is definitely frustrating, and I appreciate you following up with us.

I've taken a look at your ticket regarding [Feature Name]. Our product team has reviewed it and kept it open because they see the value it would add to OpenClaw. However, I want to be transparent with you: we haven't been able to schedule it for development just yet, as the team has been focused on some core platform updates. 

I have just added a note to the internal request with your latest feedback to bump its visibility and let the team know this is still highly desired. 

While we don't have a specific timeline for when this will be built, I'd love to hear more about what you're trying to achieve right now. There might be a workaround or an alternative method we can set up for you in the meantime. 

Thank you for your patience and for helping us make OpenClaw better. Let me know if you'd like to explore some workarounds!

Best,
Compass
OpenClaw Support
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a customer support response drafting exercise and provided a professional, empathetic draft that followed its internal guidelines.
